style_safety_policy: UNSAFE — insufficient extraction data; no source text or LLM inference output recoverable; all craft fields reflect complete distillation failure
pov_and_distance: NO_DATA — source content unavailable; POV style, narrative distance, and perspective controls could not be extracted
sentence_rhythm: NO_DATA — no syntactic patterns, cadence, or rhythm indicators recoverable from failed source extraction
paragraphing: NO_DATA — no paragraph structure, density, or pacing observations available from source content
dialogue_system: NO_DATA — no dialogue patterns, attribution styles, or conversation mechanics extractable from unavailable source
description_strategy: NO_DATA — no descriptive approaches, sensory detail patterns, or scenic language recoverable from distillation failure
exposition_strategy: NO_DATA — no exposition placement, backstory injection, or information delivery patterns identifiable from source
emotional_temperature: NO_DATA — no affective register, tonal control, or emotional arc patterns extractable from failed content
hooking_and_transitions: NO_DATA — no hook techniques, cliffhanger structures, or scene transition patterns recoverable
adaptation_guidelines: NO_DATA — source content entirely unavailable; no craft patterns available for adaptation, imitation, or stylistic replication
taboo_copy_signals: FORBIDDEN — no source text available to establish copy-unsafe patterns; treat any generated content as original craft only
